pool.baseline: it's just so quiet. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but its just the silence. the house feels like a tomb and honestly i dont even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore. what's the point of even existing when the only person who made it all make sense is just... gone.

pool.baseline: it just feels so pointless lately. like, i was reading about entropy and heat death again, and everything just feels so small. if the universe is just gonna end in total darkness anyway, why do any of this even matter? all the stress, the work, the trying to "be someone"... it's all just a temporary glitch in a void that doesn't care. it feels like we're just fighting a losing battle for no reason.

pool.baseline: i honestly dont even know what the point is anymore. spent 5 years on this project and now the lab is pulling the funding and the data is just... gone. everything i am is tied to this work and without it i just feel like a hollow shell. i'm just so incredibly tired of trying to keep my head above water. i just want the noise to stop.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very embers of my soul. How can one continue to breathe when the air itself feels heavy with the weight of his betrayal? Every heartbeat is but a cruel reminder of the life I no longer wish to endure. It feels as though the shadows are calling to me, whispering that there is a certain... peace... waiting in the darkness, far away from this hollow existence.
